rootCause: The completionist/catalog dialogue and its logging process still required the raw Completionist Award II item even though common progression consumes that item in completionist/polish and produces Completionist Award II (polished).
resolution: Updated completionist/catalog and the record-completionist-award-entry process to require Completionist Award II (polished), synchronized generated process data, and added regression coverage to ensure catalog remains gated on the post-transform polished award.
